fieldPolicies.eventId: deterministic event identifier generated from event type, aggregate identifier, UTC occurrence time, and idempotency fingerprint
fieldPolicies.aggregateType: must be idea_candidate for candidate workflow events
fieldPolicies.aggregateId: internal aggregate identifier; not client-ready publication identity
fieldPolicies.schemaVersion: must be v1 for all event families in this contract
fieldPolicies.occurredAtUtc: must be timezone-aware UTC ISO-8601 text
fieldPolicies.correlationId: required product-safe workflow correlation identifier preserved across request, state change, replay, and publication
fieldPolicies.traceId: required product-safe distributed trace identifier; never derived from or substituted by causationId
fieldPolicies.causationId: optional product-safe parent event or workflow identifier; present only when a causal parent exists
fieldPolicies.lineageOrigin: request, parent_event, system_generated, or legacy_migrated; identifies how correlation and trace context were established
fieldPolicies.payload: source-safe string map with no raw source payload, portfolio, account, holding, client, route, request, response, content hash, evidence hash, or raw idempotency key

eventFamilies.description: Candidate persisted after source-owned signal evaluation and internal idempotent persistence.
Candidate lifecycle status changed through governed internal workflow.
Advisor review decision recorded with caller and entitlement checks upstream of suitability authority.
Advisor feedback recorded for learning, triage, and review-cycle telemetry.
Reviewed opportunity conversion intent requested for Advise, Manage, or Report realization.
Source-authorized downstream conversion outcome recorded in lotus-idea.
Report evidence-pack request recorded before Report, Render, and Archive materialization proof.

payloadSafetyPolicy.failureReasonPolicy: publisher failure reasons must use governed status codes and must not echo sensitive source or transport content
